Actions.Text: REFERRED TO CORPORATIONS, AUTHORITIES AND COMMISSIONS

Title: Relates to settlement negotiations in major electric, natural gas, water, and steam rate increase proceedings before the public service commission
Summary: Requires the department of public service to assign an administrative law judge to preside over all rate case settlement negotiations.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public service law, in relation to requiring an administrative law judge to oversee the settlement negotiation process in major electric, natural gas, water, and steam rate increase proceedings before the public service commission
